title: 1% SDS in DNA Buffer Preparation
author: Andrew Baker
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.dys7wd

steps.title: Prepare 4 M NaCl stock solution
steps.instruction: Prepare stock solution of 4 M Sodium chloride in MilliQ water.

steps.title: Prepare 0.5 M EDTA stock solution
steps.instruction: Prepare stock solution of 0.5 M EDTA in MilliQ water.

steps.title: Mix NaCl and EDTA solutions
steps.instruction: Mix 50 mL 4 M NaCl and 50 mL 0.5 M EDTA.

steps.title: Adjust volume to 500 mL
steps.instruction: Make up to a final volume of 500 mL with MilliQ water.

steps.title: Dissolve SDS in DNA Buffer
steps.instruction: Dissolve SDS in DNA Buffer to a final concentration of 1% (w/v). e.g., 5 g SDS in 500 mL of DNA Buffer.
